title: Rinkēvičs: Restructuring of airBaltic in order
summary_full: A restructuring of Latvia's national airline airBaltic should be discussed, President Edgars Rinkēvičs said on Wednesday following a meeting with Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity).
summary_public: A restructuring of Latvia's national airline airBaltic should be discussed, President Edgars Rinkēvičs said on Wednesday following a meeting with Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity).

LV.label: neutral
